rationale: The citing paper references Ansari, Essegaier, and Kohli (2000) mainly as a representative prior hybrid recommendation approach in literature review sections. It is also cited to note that earlier hybrid models often relied on genre features, which motivates the new feature-construction focus of this paper. However, the 2019 study does not build directly on that model, reuse its estimation framework, or run direct empirical comparisons against it, so the citation functions as background positioning rather than a specific technical or conceptual dependency.
